title: dryopteris lonchitis
intro: Dryopteris lonchitis, also known as male fern, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Dryopteris genus and is native to Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiparasitic and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Dryopteris lonchitis include its ability to treat parasitic worm infestations, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Dryopteris lonchitis is often used as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
